texto: Those who make us believe that anything’s possible and fire our imagination over the long haul, are often the ones who have survived the bleakest of circumstances. The men and women who have every reason to despair, but don’t, may have the most to teach us, not only about how to hold true to our beliefs, but about how such a life can bring about seemingly impossible social change.
explicacao: Citação de Paul Rogat Loeb sobre limites e escolhas conscientes. “Those who make us believe that anything’s possible and fire our imagination over the long haul, a…” articula educacao, despair, esperanca em registro de educacao, com relevância para contextos como mudanca e esperanca.
